summary: TWO_COLUMN: hatched horizontal mirror with green normal at the hit point on the left. ValueTracker θ_i sweeps the incidence angle through several values (20°, 65°, 30°, 75°, 45°); incident arrow, reflected arrow, both angle arcs, and their labels redraw via always_redraw using θ_r = θ_i. Right column has live θ_i, θ_r, and the law statement.
